title: nototriche viridula
intro: Nototriche viridula, also known as the green Nototriche, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae, native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which provide various health benefits, including antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory effects. Nototriche viridula can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used as a powder for medicinal purposes.
